sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n68034" key="misobasileu/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μῑσο-βᾰσῐλεύς</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">έως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n68034.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">king-hater</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.147a</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
